biological_replicate: N=3 replicates per model (AEW and MC903) per condition (treated and control)
technical_replicate: N=3 replicates per model (AEW and MC903) per condition (treated and control)
factor_value: two mouse models of chronic itch—Acetone-Ether-Water (AEW, dry skin) and calcipotriol (MC903, atopic dermatitis)
number_of_technical_replicates: N=3 replicates per model and N=4 per condition per treatment
